arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Connect security profile.

description.description: A brief description of the AWS Connect security profile.

id.description: The unique identifier of the AWS Connect security profile.

name.description: The name of the AWS Connect security profile.

organization_resource_id.description: The resource identifier for the organization associated with the AWS Connect security profile.

permissions.description: A set of permissions assigned to the AWS Connect security profile.

security_profile_id.description: The security profile ID used within AWS Connect.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS Connect security profile.
